seasonal_maintenance.headline: Maintaining peak kWh in {{state}}
seasonal_maintenance.fall_tips: Clear leaf debris from under the racking near {{parks}} before the first winter snow. Rodents often nest under panels in {{city}}.
seasonal_maintenance.summer_tips: Wash your panels near {{neighborhood}} after spring pollen. High {{state}} humidity can cause a fine film that reduces efficiency by 5-8%.

comparison_guide.title: Solar Purchase vs. Solar Lease in {{city}}

comparison.details: Ownership allows {{city}} homeowners to claim the 30% Federal Tax Credit. Leasing in {{neighborhood}} has $0 down but lower overall ROI over 20 years in {{county}}.
